WHERE station.lat <= 37.787152 AND status.bikes_available >= 8 AND station.installation_date = '8/20/2013' AND status.time >= '2015-06-02 13:10:02' AND station.city = 'San Francisco'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which station entities with lat at most '37.787152' and installation date equal to '8/20/2013' and city equal to 'San Francisco', having at least one related status record (linked on station.id = status.station_id) with bikes available at least '8' and time at least '2015-06-02 13:10:02'?

qa_pairs.question: Which stations named San Antonio Caltrain Station in Mountain View have at least 23 docks, a longitude of -122.10675800000001, and status updates on or after 2015-06-02 13:50:03?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.name = 'San Antonio Caltrain Station' AND status.time >= '2015-06-02 13:50:03' AND station.city = 'Mountain View' AND station.dock_count >= 23 AND station.long = -122.10675800000001
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which station entities with name equal to 'San Antonio Caltrain Station' and city equal to 'Mountain View' and dock count at least '23' and long equal to '-122.10675800000001', having at least one related status record (linked on station.id = status.station_id) with time at least '2015-06-02 13:50:03'?

qa_pairs.question: Which stations located exactly at longitude -122.40724499999999 have at most 15 docks, latitude at most 37.798522, and since 2015-06-02 13:16:02 have had no more than 4 docks available?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.long = -122.40724499999999 AND station.dock_count <= 15 AND station.lat <= 37.798522 AND status.time >= '2015-06-02 13:16:02' AND status.docks_available <= 4
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which station entities with long equal to '-122.40724499999999' and dock count at most '15' and lat at most '37.798522', having at least one related status record (linked on station.id = status.station_id) with time at least '2015-06-02 13:16:02' and docks available at most '4'?

qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.lat <= 37.487615999999996 AND status.bikes_available <= 6 AND station.city = 'Redwood City' AND status.time = '2015-06-02 14:47:02'

qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.city = 'San Francisco' AND station.dock_count = 15 AND station.long >= -122.40512700000001
